arguments.argument: //Get in cannon if oKeyCodes.kCodePressed[3]=1 and bCannonInUse=0 and global.gamePaused=false { oPlayer1.kLeft=0 oPlayer1.kRight=0 oPlayer1.kUp=0 oPlayer1.kDown=0 oPlayer1.xVel=0; oPlayer1.xAcc=0 oPlayer1.state=oPlayer1.STANDING oPlayer1.attackState=oPlayer1.ACT_IN_CANNON oPlayer1.bCanTakeDamage=false oPlayer1.canAirDash=1 oPlayer1.doubleJumpCheck=1 oPlayer1.visible=0 depth=10 bCannonInUse=1 }
